companies.name: Apple
risk_factors: Single-source dependency on TSMC for all A-series and M-series chip fabrication
Concentrated assembly operations in China (Foxconn/Pegatron), with India expansion underway
Supply chain spans 43 countries across 6 continents
Exposure to China-Taiwan geopolitical tensions impacting 92% of advanced chip supply
Tariff exposure: 32% tariff on Taiwan imports (2025) could add $120-200 per iPhone

companies.name: TSMC
risk_factors: Geographic concentration: 92% of advanced chip manufacturing in Taiwan
Taiwan is 160km from mainland China — military blockade risk assessed at elevated
Sole supplier of sub-5nm chips globally — no alternative manufacturer exists
Water scarcity risk: Fab operations require 156,000 tons of water daily
EUV machine dependency on ASML — single vendor for most critical equipment

companies.name: Qualcomm
risk_factors: High dependency on TSMC for Snapdragon chip fabrication
Gallium dependency for 5G RF front-end modules — China controls 80% of supply
Licensing revenue vulnerable to customer in-house chip development (Apple modem)
Export restriction risk: US-China tensions affecting chip sales to Chinese OEMs
